title: Galapagos
tagline: Stanford documentary — chasing wonder at the edge of the Galápagos
description: A short documentary about Stanford students and alumni learning together in the Galápagos Islands.
what:
Stanford education extends beyond the classroom, and beyond your twenties.

Our panga bounced in the choppy water. We'd caught two flights, a bus, another flight, another bus, a ferry, another bus, and were finally at our destination — an abandoned archipelago in the middle of the Pacific. The isolation of the Galápagos is its source of power; but also renders it devastatingly fragile.

Twelve Sophomore undergrads were there for a class called Darwin, Evolution, Galápagos. 30 alumni were there for a Continued Learning vacation. The professor was there to make sure everyone learned and stayed alive.
why: Stanford asked me to capture its community's love of learning as seen through the frame of this magical wilderness.
